productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Black Load Spring Backpack
description: Style NoteIf you want a bag that's funky, stylish, cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this piece from adidas. The Climacool technology allows for breathability on a hot day. Carry it to college, work or on a casual day out with your friends.Product DetailsBlack backpack with 3 stripe theme, two front zipped pockets with inner organiser pouches, one main zipped compartment with inner laptop compartment, two adjustable padded shoulder straps with load spring technology, foam backing for carrying ease, two mesh pockets on either side, haul loop, branding on the frontMaterial and Care100% PESWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 45 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 16 cm
